title: Fluffy Slovakian Rocket Dumplings
description: A nutty and pillowy post-workout dish featuring rocket, with a mantecare-emulsify method for a creamy sauce, this Slovakian recipe is a perfect way to refuel after a workout.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
In a blender, blend the rocket leaves, flour, eggs, milk, and a pinch of salt until smooth.
Heat the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the blended rocket mixture to the saucepan and cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
Stir in the parmesan cheese until melted and well combined.
Using a mantecare-emulsify method, slowly pour in the chopped walnuts while constantly stirring the sauce.
Reduce heat to low and simmer the sauce for 5 minutes.
Using a spoon, drop the dumpling mixture into the boiling water and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the dumplings float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and serve with the rocket sauce.
